title: Crisp Bean Stir Fry
description: A simple and delicious stir fry made with crispy beans and a variety of spices.

ingredients.name: Crisp beans
ingredients.notes: any type of bean will work

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and ginger and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the crisp beans and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes, or until they start to brown.
Add the soy sauce, salt, and Spanish fry spice mix. Stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes, or until the beans are coated in the sauce.
Serve the bean stir fry hot, garnished with additional soy sauce and spices if desired.
